feature_name: E2E Test Suite Rewrite & Authoring Guide

skipped_smoke_tests.name: F5-F6 E2E Tests — App Shell, Platform Services & System Tray
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Run `dotnet test tests/e2e/MySecondBrain.Tests.E2E --configuration Debug --filter "FullyQualifiedName~AppShell|FullyQualifiedName~Platform|FullyQualifiedName~SystemTray"`. Verify exit code 0 and all ~32 tests pass. Verify only ONE `[FIXTURE] Launching app` line appears in output (proves ICollectionFixture is working).
